name: fleet-health-demo
description: Generic fleet health workflow for AI operators: inspect nodes, services, disk, and security posture through MeshClaw Runtime without any email-specific assumptions.

steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would collect read-only security, hygiene, and log evidence.

steps.title: Build autoheal plan

steps.title: Gate safe autoheal application
